penalties.description: Task appears to be a demonstration or practice session without clear completion. No final suture cut or completion state visible.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude identified this as an incomplete demonstration video with no clear start/end points or target passes, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task with timing and penalties. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was actually completed, and Claude's detailed reasoning about the demonstration nature of the video, the incomplete task assessment is more defensible under FLS scoring requirements.

disagreements.rationale: If the task is incomplete as Claude assessed, no completion time should be recorded

claude_value.description: Task appears to be a demonstration or practice session without clear completion. No final suture cut or completion state visible.

gpt_value.description: The suture was not passed through one of the marked targets.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is a more fundamental assessment that supersedes technique penalties. Claude's detailed reasoning about demonstration nature is more thorough.
If the task is incomplete, the additional phases reported by GPT-4o are not valid completion phases
Incomplete tasks receive zero score regardless of partial technique demonstration
